summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CEO System - autonomous AI company generation platform. Backend APIs mostly functional (91.7% success rate), frontend dashboard fully operational with all components and AI controls working.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 error with 'title' message when generating books

minor_issues.issue: Returns 200 instead of 201 for product creation
minor_issues.impact: Incorrect HTTP status code but functionality works

passed_tests: AI Team Control buttons clickable and functional ✅
Dashboard components visible (product feed, revenue chart, opportunities panel) ✅
AI functions trigger correctly and redirect to appropriate tabs ✅
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix AI book generation endpoint (/api/ai/generate-book) - currently returning 500 error with 'title' message. This appears to be an issue in the book_writer AI service. Also consider fixing the product creation endpoint to return proper 201 status code.
